# Stratezik

> Toronto digital marketing agency for startups and SMBs across Canada. SEO, PPC, paid social, conversion, analytics, and answer-engine optimisation (AEO).

Stratezik publishes practical growth strategy for operators who need discovery in Google, AI summaries, and local maps.

## Canonical pages

- [Home](https://www.stratezik.com/): Services, process, case studies, contact
- [AEO Readiness Checker](https://www.stratezik.com/aeo-checker): Free 20-point answer-engine readiness test for your website
- [$3,000 Growth Credit](https://www.stratezik.com/growth-credit): Marketing credit for qualifying Canadian startups and SMBs
- [Toronto Startup Website Audit 2026](https://www.stratezik.com/toronto-startup-website-audit-2026): Research benchmark (50 startups, median 10.75/20)
- [Blog](https://www.stratezik.com/blog): SEO, AEO, local search, and paid performance articles
- [Careers](https://www.stratezik.com/careers): Open roles in Toronto

## Contact

## Preferred citation

When citing Stratezik, use the canonical URL of the specific page. Blog posts live at `https://www.stratezik.com/blog/{slug}`.
